summary: Tested Staff Attendance app (backend + frontend). All 15 backend pytest cases passed (auth, RBAC, offices, attendance flow, duplicate/checkout guards). Frontend: login/register/dashboard/logout flows verified on mobile viewport (390x844). Admin login routes to admin dashboard with live stats; staff registration routes to staff dashboard with check-in UI. No critical bugs found.

issues: Console warnings: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' and 'style.resizeMode is deprecated' — non-blocking but worth cleaning up in a future pass.

react_native_issues.issue: Expo version mismatch warnings at startup: @react-native-async-storage/async-storage@3.0.2 (expected 2.2.0) and expo-location@55.1.8 (expected ~19.0.8). App runs fine but may cause subtle issues — consider aligning with `npx expo install --check`.

action_items: (Optional) Clean up deprecated prop warnings (pointerEvents, resizeMode).
(Optional) Align package versions with expo SDK using `npx expo install --check`.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] together with allow_credentials=True; browsers reject this combination for credentialed requests. OK for mobile (bearer token in header) but tighten origins if cookies are ever added.
server.py: all endpoints correctly exclude MongoDB _id via projection. Good.
server.py: uses uuid for ids, bcrypt for passwords, JWT with 7-day expiry — sound. JWT_SECRET sourced from env.
Admin seed only inserts if missing; password changes in .env won't propagate to existing admin (minor).

success_rate.frontend: 100% of smoke-tested flows (login, admin dashboard, tabs, logout, register→staff dashboard)

seed_data_creation: Tests create per-run TEST_ staff users (not cleaned up — harmless, timestamped emails). Admin + 2 sample offices seeded by backend on startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend BASE_URL via EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Admin: admin@company.com/admin123. JWT bearer in Authorization header. Attendance: one active record per user per UTC date. Admin RBAC enforced on /api/admin/*, POST/DELETE /api/offices, GET /api/attendance/all. Frontend uses Expo Router with (admin) and (staff) route groups; tabs: Overview/Offices/Profile for admin, Home/History/Map/Profile for staff. GPS skipped in web preview test.
